title: CogApprovalResponse
description: COG's response to an SDL approval request (Phase 2 approval envelope).

request_id.description: Stable identifier of the approval request being answered.

task_frame_ref.description: Reference to the task frame that generated the request.

surface_ref.description: Reference to the surface that rendered the approval.

resolved_at.description: When the response was created (Unix milliseconds).

reason.description: Optional human-readable explanation for the decision.

new_scope.description: Required when decision is redirect; the reframed scope.

approval_decision.description: The user's decision on an SDL approval request.
